name: Spinach-Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw and squeeze out excess moisture from the spinach.
2. Grease a 9x5x3 inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix Bisquick®, vegetable oil, caraway seed, and eggs until well combined.
4. Add the condensed cheddar cheese soup and incorporate.
5. Stir in the thawed and drained spinach until evenly distributed.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 55 to 65 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow cooling for 20 minutes before removing from the pan.
